## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (`ruff check .` passes)
- [ ] My code is formatted with `ruff format` (`ruff format --check .` passes)
- [ ] Type annotations are complete and `mypy torchxai` passes
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (docstrings, README, or `docs/`) where relevant
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` with a brief description
- [ ] I have added or updated tests that cover the changed code
- [ ] All CI checks pass
